meaning: Zimbabwe African National Union 津巴布韦非洲民族联盟
examples: ZANU-PF and Mr Makoni apart, the official opposition is weaker than ever.
But Mr Makoni's team thinks sympathizers in ZANU-PF will give valuable tip-offs to help stymie the rigging.
The funds are likely to benefit selected institutions that consolidate Mugabe and Zanu-PF's stranglehold on power.
Bright Matonga, a spokesman for the ruling ZANU-PF, said all parties agreed to the decision.
President Mugabe has allocated the main ministries, including defence, home, foreign affairs, and justice to Zanu-PF.
